notes: Listed equity + equity MFs + equity hybrid MFs. Pre-Budget 2024 was 15%; bumped to 20% from 2024-07-23.
Held > 12 months. First 1.25L per FY exempt. Pre-Budget 2024 was 10% with 1L exemption.
Bought >= 2023-04-01: ALL gains taxed at slab regardless of holding. No LTCG benefit. Finance Act 2023.
Bought < 2023-04-01: STCG at slab if held <= 36 months
Bought < 2023-04-01 + held > 36 months: 20% with indexation grandfathered.
Property held <= 24 months: STCG at slab rate
Held > 24 months: 12.5% without indexation. For property bought before 2024-07-23, taxpayer can choose 20% with indexation.
Sovereign Gold Bond held to maturity (8 years): FULLY EXEMPT. Sold on exchange before maturity: equity-style 12.5% LTCG.
